title: keyfile load_identity reads file with no size cap
description: core/src/keyfile.rs line 18: std::fs::read(keyfile_path) has no size limit. If the keyfile path is replaced by an adversary or is a symlink to a large file, the entire contents are read into memory before the age Decryptor sees them. For a legitimate keyfile this is harmless (~200 bytes), but a replaced file of any size causes a full allocation. Fix: open the file, check metadata length (expecting <=512 bytes), and error before reading if too large, e.g. File::open + Read::take(512) + BufReader.
